violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was washed and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to send glasses and other dishware from the bar through kitchen dishwasher until unit is repaired or replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

TCS food items in the walk-in cooler and prep units were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Salmon filets were observed in their original reduced oxygen packaging (ROP) in grill drawer #1. ROP seafood shall be removed from their original packaging prior to thawing and then cold holding. Food items were observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit and were removed from their packaging during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the warehouse, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both prep unit in the kitchen. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of both prep units, and both walk-in coolers, as well as the shelving within the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The wastewater from the ice machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The floors in the kitchen and floors in the bar area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbant, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

Drips were observed beginning to form on the Ansul pipes within the hood ventilation system. Equipment within the hood ventilation system shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the potential for contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
